title: World Eater
description: World Eater adds blocks and items that aid in the complete destruction of a Minecraft World.
body:
# World Eater
World Eater adds blocks and items that aid in the complete destruction of a Minecraft World.

## Blocks
- World Eater
- World Eater Eater
- World Eater Ore
- World Eater Eater Ore
- Diamond Glass

## Items
- World Eater Gem
- World Eater Eater Gem

## Potion Effects
- Decay
- Decay II
